Re Notice (Amended) Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss, Or Alternatively, Stay, Civil Proceedings
Off Calendar Sep-27-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS BLOOMINGDALE'S, INC., ALAN SVENSEN, and ROBERT GASSENSMITH 'S (AMENDED) MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND DISMISS, OR ALTERNATIVELY, STAY, CIVIL PROCEEDINGS.

APPEARANCES: James M. Braden, Esq. of Law Offices of James M. Braden 398-6865 for pltf & opposing party; Susan T. Kumagai, Esq. of Lafayette & Kumagai LLP 357-4600 for defts & moving parties.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED, THE CIVIL CASE IS STAYED PENDING ARBITRATION. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO JUDICIAL NOTICE IS SUSTAINED. Defendant to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: GORDON AIAVAO, CSR #11216
